graviton.title: Privacy Policy
graviton.section1Text: Some general and technical data are collected to ensure the stable operation of our application, to provide in-game services, and to perform basic analyses.
graviton.section1_A_Text: In-game data such as player level progress, points earned, and game settings (sound, music, vibration, etc.) are stored only on your own device. This data is not transferred to any external server.
graviton.section1_B_Text: In order to optimize the application, resolve technical errors, verify in-game purchases, and display advertisements, the following standard third-party services are used. These services may collect device/advertising ID (IDFA/GAID), coarse location (country/city), and technical system information within the framework of their own privacy policies:
graviton.section1_B_AdMob: Google AdMob (Advertising Services): For delivering rewarded and interstitial in-game ads and tracking ad limits.
graviton.section1_B_RevenueCat: RevenueCat (Purchase Management): For verifying "Premium" purchase status and store transactions (App Store / Play Store).
graviton.section1_B_Firebase: Firebase (App Analytics and Settings): For measuring application performance and synchronizing in-game levels.
graviton.section1_B_Sentry: Sentry (Technical Stability and Error Reporting): For detecting and resolving crashes and technical system errors that may occur within the application.
graviton.section2Text: The general and technical data collected are used solely for the following purposes:
graviton.section2Item1: Ensuring smooth operation of in-game levels, progress, and settings,
graviton.section2Item2: Verifying and protecting the Premium rights you purchased,
graviton.section2Item3: Improving the game experience by resolving crashes and technical errors,
graviton.section2Item4: Showing legally compliant ads in accordance with the user's region and consent (UMP).
graviton.section3Text: Your personal data is never sold or shared directly with third parties. Data is processed only through the licensed infrastructure providers listed above (Google, RevenueCat, Sentry) under their own legal privacy agreements.
graviton.section4Title: 4. User Rights and Consent Management (GDPR / KVKK)
graviton.section4_UMP_Text: In regions where required by law (e.g. European Economic Area), you can update the privacy consent form presented to you upon first launch at any time from the in-game Settings > Privacy Preferences section.
graviton.section4_AdID_Text: You can limit or reset your advertising ID (IDFA/GAID) at any time from your device's operating system settings.
graviton.section5Text: Our application does not intend to collect specific data from children. If you believe your child has shared data with us as a parent or guardian, please contact us; necessary measures will be taken immediately.
graviton.section6Text: This Privacy Policy may be updated depending on application updates or legal requirements. Updates are effective from the moment they are published on this page.
graviton.section7Text: You can contact us for your questions and feedback:
graviton.finalText: Thank you for playing Graviton. Enjoy the game!
